style_notes: Clean polished chibi anime sprite style matching the meimi-striped-shortalls base image; flat removable chroma key background; full body compact pet silhouette.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
